testsuite.name: Chat Stream Service Fallback 테스트

testcase.name: Redis Stream 실패 → MongoDB Fallback 성공

failure.message: Wanted but not invoked: streamOperations.add( <any string>, <any java.util.Map> ); -> at org.springframework.data.redis.core.StreamOperations.add(StreamOperations.java:158) Actually, there were zero interactions with this mock.

testcase.failure:
Wanted but not invoked: streamOperations.add( <any string>, <any java.util.Map> ); -> at org.springframework.data.redis.core.StreamOperations.add(StreamOperations.java:158) Actually, there were zero interactions with this mock.
at app//org.springframework.data.redis.core.StreamOperations.add(StreamOperations.java:158) at app//com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.saveToStream_RedisFail_MongoFallbackSuccess(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:112) at java.base@17.0.12/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: 부분 실패 시나리오 - 일부는 Redis 성공, 일부는 Fallback

failure.message: org.mockito.exceptions.verification.TooFewActualInvocations: streamOperations.add( <any string>, <any java.util.Map> ); Wanted 2 times: -> at org.springframework.data.redis.core.StreamOperations.add(StreamOperations.java:158) But was 1 time: -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceImpl.saveToStream(ChatStreamServiceImpl.java:33)

testcase.failure:
org.mockito.exceptions.verification.TooFewActualInvocations: streamOperations.add( <any string>, <any java.util.Map> ); Wanted 2 times: -> at org.springframework.data.redis.core.StreamOperations.add(StreamOperations.java:158) But was 1 time: -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceImpl.saveToStream(ChatStreamServiceImpl.java:33)
at app//org.springframework.data.redis.core.StreamOperations.add(StreamOperations.java:158) at app//com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.saveToStream_PartialFailureScenario(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:293) at java.base@17.0.12/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: 동시성 테스트 - 여러 메시지 동시 처리
Settlement Data가 없는 일반 메시지 Fallback

failure.message: org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.UnnecessaryStubbingException: Unnecessary stubbings detected. Clean & maintainable test code requires zero unnecessary code. Following stubbings are unnecessary (click to navigate to relevant line of code): 1. -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.setUp(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:52) 2. -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.saveToStream_RegularMessage_FallbackSuccess(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:177) Please remove unnecessary stubbings or use 'lenient' strictness. More info: javadoc for UnnecessaryStubbingException class.

testcase.failure: org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.UnnecessaryStubbingException: Unnecessary stubbings detected. Clean & maintainable test code requires zero unnecessary code. Following stubbings are unnecessary (click to navigate to relevant line of code): 1. -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.setUp(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:52) 2. -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.saveToStream_RegularMessage_FallbackSuccess(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:177) Please remove unnecessary stubbings or use 'lenient' strictness. More info: javadoc for UnnecessaryStubbingException class. at app//org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension.lambda$afterEach$2(MockitoExtension.java:200) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at app//org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension.afterEach(MockitoExtension.java:198) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testsuite.system-out:
08:53:36.957 [Test worker] ERROR com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceImpl -- ❌ Redis Stream 저장 실패, MongoDB Fallback 시도: roomId=room-456, messageId=test-msg-123 org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.InvalidUseOfMatchersException: Invalid use of argument matchers! 0 matchers expected, 1 recorded: -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.saveToStream_RedisFail_MongoFallbackSuccess(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:105)
This exception may occur if matchers are combined with raw values: //incorrect: someMethod(any(), "raw String"); When using matchers, all arguments have to be provided by matchers. For example: //correct: someMethod(any(), eq("String by matcher"));
For more info see javadoc for Matchers class.

org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.InvalidUseOfMatchersException: Invalid use of argument matchers! 0 matchers expected, 1 recorded: -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.service.ChatStreamServiceTest.saveToStream_RegularMessage_FallbackSuccess(ChatStreamServiceTest.java:178)
This exception may occur if matchers are combined with raw values: //incorrect: someMethod(any(), "raw String"); When using matchers, all arguments have to be provided by matchers. For example: //correct: someMethod(any(), eq("String by matcher"));
For more info see javadoc for Matchers class.
at org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate.opsForStream(RedisTemplate.java:1044) at
